# 🧠 Behavioral Nudge Engine — Helm Deliverables
**Generated by:** Behavioral Nudge Engine Agent (lens applied to audits)
**Date:** June 12, 2026
**Inputs:** BEHAVIORAL_NUDGE_AUDIT (62/100), UI_UX_AUDIT (78/100), CLAUDE.md, Final Product Doctrine
**Purpose:** Actionable nudge infrastructure specs for upgrading Helm's Android & iOS app

## DELIVERABLE 1: Boundary Event Wiring Plan

The audit found 4 registered events that are never called. These are the behavioral signals we need.

### Where to wire each event

```
EVENT                    TRIGGER CONDITION                              FILE TO WIRE
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sts_at_risk_entered     Safe-to-Spend drops below "at risk" threshold    lib/features/s2s/domain/s2s_calculator.dart
                        (typically when S2S < fixed costs + buffer)      → after computeS2S() determines state = atRisk

reserve_depleted         Buffer/reserve balance reaches 0                lib/features/reserve/domain/reserve_manager.dart
                                                                         → after reserve withdrawal brings balance to 0

first_pipeline_entry     First pipeline entry ever created by user       lib/features/pipeline/data/pipeline_repository.dart
                                                                         → after successful add, if event count == 1

pipeline_state_changed   Any pipeline entry changes status               lib/features/pipeline/data/pipeline_repository.dart
                         (expected → received, expected → overdue, etc.) → after status update succeeds
```

### Wiring code pattern

```dart
// In the trigger location:
ref.read(analyticsServiceProvider).logEvent(
  AnalyticsEvent.stsAtRiskEntered,
  properties: {
    's2s_amount': s2sValue,
    'fixed_costs_total': fixedCostsTotal,
    'buffer_percentage': bufferPercent,
  },
);
```

## DELIVERABLE 2: Nudge Sequence Design

### Day 0 → Week 4+ nudge calendar

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ DAY 0: ONBOARDING COMPLETE                                       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ In-app banner: "Your Safe-to-Spend is set up. Add a pipeline     │
│ entry when you invoice a client — Helm tracks it for you."    │
│ [Dismiss]                   [Add First Payment →]                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ DAY 1: MORNING (if cadence = daily)                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Push: "Morning. Your safe-to-spend is ৳24,500 today."           │
│ → Informational only. Opens dashboard. No action required.       │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ DAY 3: NO PIPELINE ENTRIES YET                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ In-app: "Got any money coming in? Add an expected payment        │
│ to start tracking your pipeline."                                │
│ [Dismiss]                   [Add Payment →]                      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ DAY 5: FIRST ENTRY EXISTS, STATUS STILL "EXPECTED"               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Notification center: "You marked a payment as expected 5 days    │
│ ago. Has it arrived? Confirming adds to your liquid balance."    │
│ [Not Yet]                  [Confirm Received →]                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ DAY 7: WEEKLY SUMMARY                                            │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Push/In-app: "This week: ৳45,200 received, ৳31,000 safe-to-     │
│ spend. Pipeline: 3 on track, 1 overdue."                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ DAY 14: QUIET AFFIRMATION                                        │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Trust strip addendum (inline, not notification):                 │
│ "14 days tracked. Your numbers are holding steady."              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ WEEK 2+: ADAPTIVE CADENCE                                        │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ If opens daily → reduce push frequency (self-engaged)            │
│ If no open in 3 days → gentle re-engagement nudge                │
│ If S2S enters "At Risk" → in-app banner (never push —            │
│   financial anxiety shouldn't ambush your lock screen)            │
│ If reserve depleted → next-app-open banner                       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## DELIVERABLE 3: Nudge Copy Library

All copy follows Helm's brand voice: clinical-warm, factual, consequence-aware.

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ NUDGE TYPE              COPY                                    CHANNEL    │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Daily S2S (morning)     "Morning. Your safe-to-spend           Push        │
│                          is ৳24,500 today."                                │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Weekly summary          "This week: ৳45,200 received,         Push/In-app │
│                          ৳31,000 safe. 2 payments confirmed.              │
│                          Pipeline: 3 on track."                            │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Overdue (single)        "A payment from [Client] was expected   Push       │
│                          [date]. Confirm or update?"                        │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Overdue (multiple)      "2 payments are past their expected     In-app     │
│                          date. The oldest is from [date]."                  │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ S2S tight               "Your safe-to-spend is tighter than     In-app     │
│                          usual. Want to review fixed costs?"    ONLY       │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Buffer depleted          "Your safety buffer is empty.          In-app     │
│                          Rebuilding it protects next month."   ONLY       │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Pipeline clean           "Your pipeline is up to date.          Trust strip│
│                          Everything on track."                             │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Tracking consistency     "You've tracked consistently for       Trust strip│
│                          14 days." (no action, inline only)                │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Re-engagement (3 days)   "Haven't seen you in a few days.       Push       │
│                          Your pipeline has 2 updates."                      │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ First payment tracked    "Your first payment is tracked.        In-app     │
│                          Check back when it arrives."                       │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Payment confirmed        [No notification. Balance updates      —          │
│                          silently. Confirmation IS the reward.]             │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Brand voice rules enforced

- ❌ No emojis in push notifications (in-app only, sparingly)
- ❌ No "Great news!" / "Amazing!" / "You're a rockstar!"
- ❌ No "Act now!" / "Don't miss out!" urgency manipulation
- ❌ No guilt: "You haven't tracked in 5 days. Your pipeline is a mess."
- ✅ Always explain consequence: "Confirm — adds to your liquid balance"
- ✅ Always offer off-ramp: Dismiss, Snooze, or "Stop checking in"

---

## DELIVERABLE 4: Preference Discovery Schema

### Cadence preference flow (onboarding or Day 1 prompt)

```
"How often should Helm check in with you?"

  ○ Daily — A morning summary of your safe-to-spend
  ○ Weekly — A weekly roundup of your pipeline and earnings
  ○ Silent — No check-ins. Open Helm when you need it.

  [Continue →]

  (If not silent) "What time works best?"
  [Time picker — defaults to 9:00 AM]

  "How should Helm reach you?"
  ☐ Push notification (message on your phone)
  ☐ In-app only (see updates when you open Helm)

  [Done]  "You can change this anytime in Settings."

Never: "We recommend daily!" — zero pressure.
```

### Storage schema (Hive)

```dart
@HiveType(typeId: nextAvailable)
class NudgePreferences {
  @HiveField(0) final String cadence;        // 'daily' | 'weekly' | 'silent'
  @HiveField(1) final TimeOfDay? checkInTime; // preferred notification time
  @HiveField(2) final bool pushEnabled;
  @HiveField(3) final bool inAppBannerEnabled;
  @HiveField(4) final bool quietAffirmationsEnabled;
  @HiveField(5) final DateTime createdAt;
  @HiveField(6) final DateTime updatedAt;
}
```

---

## DELIVERABLE 5: Quiet Affirmation System

The audit scores Celebration & Reinforcement at 10/100 (deliberately absent per ONB-014). But the nudge engine's Phase 4 requires *some* positive reinforcement. Resolution: **"Quiet Affirmation" tier** — acknowledgment, not celebration.

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ TIER 1: RELIEF SIGNALS (negative space = reward)                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ LedgerRail all-green → "Everything on track" pill (subtle)      │
│ No overdue entries → trust strip: "Pipeline up to date"         │
│ S2S stable 7+ days → no nudge sent. Stability IS the reward.   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ TIER 2: CONSISTENCY ACKNOWLEDGMENT (clinical, factual)          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ "7 days tracked" (trust strip, small)                           │
│ "14 days tracked" (trust strip, small)                          │
│ "30 days tracked — your numbers are holding steady"             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ TIER 3: MILESTONE WHISPER (one-time, in-app only)               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ "First month of tracking. Average monthly income: ৳X."          │
│ "100th payment tracked."                                        │
│ (Factual. No 🎉. No exclamation marks. No "congratulations.")   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ NEVER: confetti, badges, points, leaderboards, "streak 🔥",     │
│ social comparison, patronizing language, gamification           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## DELIVERABLE 6: Dashboard "Next Best Action" Card

The audit found: dashboard is passive (score: 75/100 cognitive load). The nudge engine's core rule: "Show the 1 most critical item, not all 50."

### Card variants

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⏰  2 payments overdue                    │
│     The oldest is from March 15.          │
│                              [Review →]   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⚡  1 payment needs your decision         │
│     Client: WebDev Inc | USD $500         │
│                              [Review →]   │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ✓   Pipeline up to date                   │
│     Everything on track.                  │
│     (no action button)                    │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ +   Add your first expected payment       │
│     Track money before it arrives.         │
│                                [Add →]    │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Design tokens

```
Card:        HelmCard, 12pt radius, hairline border, warm white bg
Urgency:     stateTight pill (overdue) / interactive pill (needs decision)
             / stateSafe pill (clean)
Icon:        contextual — clock (overdue), lightning (needs decision),
             check (clean), plus (empty)
Typography:  labelSm for urgency badge, bodySm for description
Touch:       entire card tappable, 44pt minimum target
Haptics:     lightImpact on card tap
Semantics:   "2 payments overdue. The oldest is from March 15. Button: Review"
```

## DELIVERABLE 7: Notification Center UI Spec

The audit found: no in-app notification center (score: 20/100 nudge delivery). Toasts are ephemeral. Users need a place to see accumulated nudges.

### Screen layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ← Notifications              Settings ⚙ │
├──────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                          │
│  TODAY                                    │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Morning summary         9:00 AM    │  │
│  │ Safe-to-spend: ৳24,500 today       │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Payment overdue         8:00 AM    │  │
│  │ Client XYZ was expected yesterday. │  │
│  │                          [Review →]│  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                          │
│  YESTERDAY                                │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ Weekly summary          Mon 9AM    │  │
│  │ ৳45,200 received, 3 on track       │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                          │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │       No older notifications     │    │
│  └──────────────────────────────────┘    │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Behavior

```
- Grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, This Week, Older)
- Unread: subtle left-border highlight (interactive color, 3pt)
- Read: no border, muted text
- Tap card → navigate to relevant screen (dashboard, pipeline, confirm sheet)
- Swipe to dismiss (with undo — consistent with app's forgiveness pattern)
- Badge on bottom nav Settings tab: unread count
- Empty state: "No notifications yet. They'll appear here when Helm has updates."
```

---

## DELIVERABLE 8: Nudge Effectiveness Tracking

### Events to add

```
NUDGE_SENT        → Fire when nudge is delivered to user
  properties: { nudgeId, nudgeType, channel, scheduledFor, deliveredAt }

NUDGE_OPENED      → Fire when user taps notification / opens from banner
  properties: { nudgeId, nudgeType, source ('push' | 'in_app' | 'center') }

NUDGE_DISMISSED   → Fire when user dismisses without acting
  properties: { nudgeId, nudgeType, dismissMethod ('swipe' | 'button') }

NUDGE_ACTIONED    → Fire when user takes the target action
  properties: { nudgeId, nudgeType, targetAction, timeToActionMs }
```

### Effectiveness measurement

```
For each nudge type, track within 30-min window:
  action_rate = NUDGE_ACTIONED / NUDGE_SENT
  open_rate   = NUDGE_OPENED / NUDGE_SENT
  dismiss_rate = NUDGE_DISMISSED / NUDGE_SENT

Auto-adjust rules:
  If dismiss_rate > 70% for a nudge type → reduce frequency
  If action_rate < 10% for a nudge type → test different copy
  If open_rate < 20% for push → maybe they prefer in-app
```

---

## DELIVERABLE 9: Haptic Feedback Plan (from UI/UX Audit cross-reference)

The UI/UX audit found zero haptic feedback (CRITICAL). The nudge engine identifies this as Fogg's "Ability" signal — confirming micro-actions without cognitive load.

```
ACTION                          HAPTIC          RATIONALE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PIN key tap                     lightImpact     Confirms each digit registered
Confirm received                mediumImpact    Reinforces commitment (Cialdini)
Delete income/cost              mediumImpact    "This is significant" signal
Undo (after delete)             lightImpact     "Reversed" confirmation
Error (validation fail)         heavyImpact     Behavior discouraged
Swipe to confirm pipeline       lightImpact     Micro-progress signal
"Next best action" card tap     lightImpact     "You're taking action"
Slider snap to round value      selectionClick  Precise value confirmation
Successful form submit          mediumImpact    Task completion reinforcement
```

---

## DELIVERABLE 10: Implementation Priority (from both audits)

### Phase 0 — No dependencies (~1-3 days)

```
#1  Wire 4 boundary events          ← Analytics foundation
#2  Add haptic feedback             ← Behavioral reinforcement
#3  Fix 3 contrast ratios           ← Accessibility + trust
#9  Add quiet affirmation signals   ← Trust strip addendum
#10 Add button active/pressed states ← Micro-confirmation
#11 Improve slider UX               ← ±1% stepper buttons
#12 Add onboarding global skip      ← Opt-out rule compliance
```

### Phase 1 — Depends on Phase 0 (~3-5 days)

```
#4  Add Hive event persistence       ← Enables cohorting & learning
#5  Add "next best action" card      ← Dashboard guidance
#6  Add Semantics to interactive     ← Inclusive nudging
#8  Add cadence preference sheet     ← Nudge engine Phase 1
```

### Phase 2 — Depends on Phase 1 (~5-10 days)

```
#7  Design notification system       ← Push + in-app + center
    (flutter_local_notifications, local-only, no Firebase)
```
